comment: Release-approved atomic browser/OS/optional-assistive-technology support matrix (TDD §12). Each row names exactly one operating system. The literal at value none requires browser-native DOM/ARIA, keyboard, focus, and live-region evidence without external AT. VoiceOver is outside this delivery contract. Normative data is referenced by the QA record (digest + approver); approval is recorded by attestation, and changing this file invalidates it.
